scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/review-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/catalog-reservation-service" "npm run dev --prefix Frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix services/api-gateway && npm install --prefix services/auth-service && npm install --prefix services/catalog-reservation-service && npm install --prefix services/review-service && npm install --prefix Frontend
